scope: Priority screen of the next 500 pending no-anchor players after batch 016, covering source rows 495-995. Includes only researched candidates whose shared calibrated projected BBPR clears 60.
method: Start from pending players after source row 494 with current-team values and no completed projection.
Screen the first 500 remaining pending rows, source rows 495 through 995.
Skip players who do not clear 60 BBPR under the shared calibration after a scored historical anchor is assigned.
For every selected no-anchor row, assign a researched historicalRating from official roster, production, recruiting, and current sentiment context.
Use official team pages first, then reputable team/local coverage when current role sentiment is needed.
Calculate opportunity, talent, projection score, and projected BBPR with the same calibration formulas used by the admin apply path.
Leave every row pending admin approval so source context can be reviewed before application.

formulas.syntheticHistoricalAnchor: No-imported-anchor players receive a researched historicalRating estimate from production, level, recruiting pedigree, physical tools, health, and role sentiment.
formulas.projectedBbprWithHistory: shared calibrateProjectedBbpr(anchoredPlayer, suggested) logic used by admin apply path

screeningSummary.excludedReason: Remaining screened rows either lacked enough sourced role/production signal, were crowded low-minute freshmen/internationals, had health/redshirt concerns, or calibrated at 60 BBPR or below.

players.researchSummary: Xavier Amos had no imported historical BBPR, so this batch assigns a scored anchor of 54 from his Loyola, Wisconsin, and Northern Illinois production before applying the shared calibration. Loyola's bio lists 18 starts in 19 games in 2025-26, 11.1 points per game, and prior Northern Illinois production of 13.8 points, 5.8 rebounds, and 1.3 blocks, supporting a real starter projection without pushing him into a top-100 tier.

teamContext.positionCompetition: Loyola (IL)'s F minutes should still be reviewed against returning contributors, portal additions, freshmen, and health before applying the suggestion.
